nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the v0.0 backwards-compatibility fixture set: a pinned snapshot of a real training run's artifacts (model and setup checkpoints plus JSON descriptors) used by test_compat_v0_0.py to verify that artifact version 0.0 files still load and run games under the current code. Explains the Git LFS storage strategy, the deliberate absence of a version key in the JSON descriptors (to exercise the default-to-0.0 code path), and the policy for capturing future fixture sets on MINOR version bumps.

nodes.name: model_config.json
nodes.summary: Pinned v0.0 main network architecture descriptor used as a backwards-compatibility test fixture. Captures the encoding dimensions (state_dim=771, choice_dim=397), the 12-family decision ordering, and the full ModelArchitecture topology (2-layer trunk/choice heads at width 128, card embedding dim 64, shared card encoder, distinct hand model, tray set embedding) as it existed before the version field was introduced.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately omits a version key to exercise the default-to-0.0 load path; do not add one.

nodes.name: setup_config.json
nodes.summary: Pinned v0.0 setup model configuration fixture recording the setup network architecture (setup_feature_dim=308, two-layer MLP at 128/64) plus the full main architecture descriptor used alongside the setup net. Used by test_compat_v0_0.py to confirm the setup checkpoint loads and plays correctly under current code.
nodes.languageNotes: Deliberately omits a version key to exercise the default-to-0.0 load path; do not add one.
